allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys, collections data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) issues = data.get\('issues', data\) if isinstance\(data, dict\) else data by_rule = collections.Counter\(i['rule'] for i in issues\) print\('Issues by rule:'\) for rule, count in sorted\(by_rule.items\(\), key=lambda x: -x[1]\): print\(f' {rule}: {count}'\) print\(f'Total: {len\(issues\)}'\) ")

Bash(python -c " import json, sys, collections with open\('C:/Users/KongaShravani/Downloads/issues.json'\) as f: data = json.load\(f\) issues = data.get\('issues', data\) if isinstance\(data, dict\) else data by_rule = collections.Counter\(i['rule'] for i in issues\) print\('Issues by rule:'\) for rule, count in sorted\(by_rule.items\(\), key=lambda x: -x[1]\): print\(f' {rule}: {count}'\) print\(f'Total: {len\(issues\)}'\) ")
